name: feat-05-onboarding-wizard
initialPrompt: New user activation is terrible — people sign up and never do anything. I want a multi-step onboarding wizard that guides users through: setting up their profile, connecting their first integration, creating their first project, and inviting a teammate. The wizard should be skippable but resumable. Show a progress checklist in the sidebar that persists until all steps are done. Track completion events so we can measure where people drop off.

blocks.text: Increase new user activation rate by guiding users to their first meaningful action
successCriteria: wizard completion tracked per step in analytics

blocks.title: Build multi-step onboarding wizard (profile → integration → project → invite)
Add persistent onboarding checklist in sidebar
acceptance: checklist visible until all steps complete
clicking step resumes wizard at that step

blocks.title: Instrument wizard steps with analytics events
acceptance: skip events tracked with step name

blocks.title: Build invite-a-teammate step with email invite
acceptance: step marked complete even if invite declined

blocks.question: Should skipping the wizard suppress it permanently or allow resuming later?
blocks.rationale: Resumable is friendlier; checklist as re-entry point.

blocks.description: Users may skip all steps immediately if wizard feels too long
blocks.mitigation: Keep wizard to ≤4 steps; each step completable in under 2 minutes

blocks.question: Which integrations should be available in the 'connect integration' onboarding step for v1?

blocks.text: Increase new user activation rate by guiding users to their first meaningful action
successCriteria: wizard completion tracked per step in analytics

blocks.title: Design and implement onboarding state model (per-user progress record)
acceptance: state table stores step completion per user

blocks.title: Send reminder email to users who skip wizard without completing
acceptance: email sent 24 h after skip if activation incomplete
email contains deep link back to wizard

blocks.description: Users may skip all steps immediately; email reminder risks feeling spammy
blocks.mitigation: Keep wizard to ≤4 steps; single reminder email with easy opt-out

idChangedButCorresponding.note: Same risk (users skipping wizard) but description updated to cover email reminder risk added in revision; id changed. AC-13 fallback must map risk-wizard-fatigue to risk-wizard-fatigue-v2.

decoy.note: Genuinely-new block. Shares surface tokens 'email' and 'wizard' with task-invite-teammate. A comment on task-invite-teammate must re-attach to task-invite-teammate (id preserved), NOT this new reminder task.

notes: Renumbering pressure: task-onboarding-state-model inserted second (shifts all subsequent positions); task-wizard-email-reminder added; risk-wizard-fatigue id changed. Naive positional scheme loses alignment for task-wizard-flow onward. Denominator is 7.
